---
id: ADR-0001
title: First half of an ADR supersession cycle
status: superseded
superseded_by: ADR-0002
---

Combined with ADR-0002 forms a superseded_by cycle (no-cycles/supersedes).
The mutual link to ADR-0002.supersedes is also missing here, but
adr-supersession-mutual fires off ADR-0001's superseded_by.
